name: Riverina Energy Storage System 2
notable: 65 MW / 130 MWh Tesla Megapack BESS near Darlington Point Solar Farm, NSW. Part of 150 MW / 300 MWh Riverina complex (with ESS 1). Developed by Edify Energy with Federation Asset Management (90% ownership). EnergyAustralia holds 10+ year market control rights. Grid-forming inverters in Virtual Synchronous Generator mode.

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

timeline.title: Commercial operations — NSW largest battery facility
timeline.detail: Edify's 65MW/130MWh RESS 2 commenced operations, making the combined Riverina facility (125MW/250MWh) NSW's largest battery at the time.

timeline.title: Largest approved grid-forming battery at financial close
timeline.detail: RESS 2 was the largest approved grid-forming BESS globally at time of financial close, using Tesla Megapack Virtual Machine Mode.
